rule CDB_Iranlinked_MuddyWater_deploys_Dindoor_ma {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Iran-linked MuddyWater deploys Dindoor malware against U.S. organizations"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-08"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "MuddyWater" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 6 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 6 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
